    current_segments = {}

        # Initialize the new segment starting at j
        next_segments[aj] = j

        current_segments.each do |v_prev, l_prev|
            v_new = v_prev | aj

        sorted_segments = next_segments.to_a.sort_by { |v, l| -l }

        l_next = j + 1 # The right boundary (exclusive) of the current segment being processed.

            l_start = l
            l_end = l_next - 1
            
            # Find M: the rightmost index m <= j where nums[m] = v.
            m = -1
            if last_occurrence.key?(v)

            end
            
            # Count i in [l_start, l_end] such that i <= m.
            # Valid range for i: [l_start, min(l_end, m)]

            if m >= l_start

            # Update l_next for the next segment (which is to the left)

        current_segments = next_segments
    end

    return total_count
